creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Wed Mar 12 15:39:14 2014
New Revision: 347982
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347982
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347982/

Log:
  - Update to 1.7.5
  - Change maintainer to submitter, maintainer has not responded for months
  
  PR:		ports/186794
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (rouslan@rshell.net, >3 weeks)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/rubygem-facter/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rubygem-facter/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-facter/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-facter/Makefile	Wed Mar 12 15:14:36 2014	(r347981)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-facter/Makefile	Wed Mar 12 15:39:14 2014	(r347982)
@@ -2,13 +2,13 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	facter
-PORTVERSION=	1.7.4
+PORTVERSION=	1.7.5
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG \
 		http://downloads.puppetlabs.com/facter/
 
-MAINTAINER=	rouslan@rshell.net
-COMMENT=	A cross-platform Ruby library for retrieving facts from OS
+MAINTAINER=	ports@robakdesign.com
+COMMENT=	Cross-platform Ruby library for retrieving facts from OS
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes

==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-facter/distinfo	Wed Mar 12 15:14:36 2014	(r347981)
